title: Gentleman Bee
description: Updates the bee model to become a gentleman
body:
# About the ResourcePack
This ResourcePack just adds a gentleman's monocole hat and a mustache for a bee. Not a big change but very nice
![cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eaecd5a351b371d560aba18528ca2571a796289.png)
## ATTENTION!!!
This resource pack will not work if you do not install [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
